info.name: Xero OAuth 2.0 & Accounting API
info.description:
## Xero OAuth 2.0 & Accounting API

This collection provides a complete integration with the Xero Accounting API using the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant flow.

### Getting Started

1. Set your `client_id` and `client_secret` collection variables (obtained from the [Xero Developer Portal](https://developer.xero.com/myapps)).
2. Go to the **Authorization** tab of this collection and click **Get New Access Token**.
3. Complete the Xero login flow — tokens are saved automatically via the collection post-response script.
4. Run **Get Connections (Tenants)** in the `2. Connections` folder to populate `tenant_id`.
5. You're ready to use the Accounting API requests.

### Authentication

OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant is configured at the collection level. All requests inherit this auth unless overridden.

- **Auth URL:** `https://login.xero.com/identity/connect/authorize`
- **Token URL:** `https://identity.xero.com/connect/token`
- **Scopes:** `openid profile email offline_access accounting.transactions accounting.settings`
- **Redirect URI:** `https://oauth.pstmn.io/v1/callback`

### Collection Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `client_id` | Your Xero app's Client ID |
| `client_secret` | Your Xero app's Client Secret |
| `access_token` | OAuth access token (auto-saved) |
| `refresh_token` | OAuth refresh token (auto-saved) |
| `tenant_id` | Xero tenant/organisation ID (auto-saved after running Get Connections) |

### Folder Structure

- **1. OAuth 2.0** — OAuth setup documentation
- **2. Connections** — Retrieve connected Xero organisations
- **3. Accounting** — Accounting API requests (bank accounts, transactions)
- **4. Token Management** — Manually refresh access tokens

item.name: 2. Connections

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X GET "https://api.xero.com/connections" -H "Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}" -H "Accept: application/json"

item.description:
## Connections

This folder handles the retrieval of **Xero tenant connections** — the organisations that the authenticated user has granted access to via the OAuth 2.0 flow.

After completing the OAuth 2.0 authorisation process and obtaining an access token, you must fetch the list of available tenants before making any accounting API calls. Each tenant represents a Xero organisation, and most Xero API endpoints require a valid `Xero-Tenant-Id` header, which is obtained from this step.

### Requests

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `https://api.xero.com/connections` | Returns the list of Xero organisations (tenants) the authenticated user has authorised access to. |

### Authentication

All requests in this folder require a valid Bearer access token passed in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}
```

Ensure the `access_token` variable is set — either via the token exchange step or by running the **Refresh Token** request — before calling any endpoint in this folder.

item.name: 3. Accounting

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X GET "https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/Accounts?where=Type%3D%3D%22BANK%22" -H "Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}" -H "xero-tenant-id: {{tenant_id}}" -H "Accept: application/json"

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X GET "https://api.xero.com/api.xro/2.0/BankTransactions?where=Type%3D%3D%22RECEIVE%22%7C%7CType%3D%3D%22SPEND%22" -H "Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}" -H "xero-tenant-id: {{tenant_id}}" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "If-Modified-Since: {{modified_since}}"

item.description:
## Accounting

This folder covers Xero Accounting API endpoints related to bank accounts and transactions. Use the requests here to retrieve bank account details and monitor money in/out transactions via the Xero API.

**Authentication:** All requests require a valid Bearer token (`{{access_token}}`) and a Xero tenant ID (`{{tenant_id}}`).

### Requests

| Request | Method | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Get Bank Accounts** | `GET` | Fetches all bank-type accounts from the Xero Accounting API |
| **Get Bank Transactions** | `GET` | Fetches bank transactions of type `RECEIVE` and `SPEND` from the Xero Accounting API |

item.name: 4. Token Management

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X POST "https://identity.xero.com/connect/token" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -H "Accept: application/json" --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" --data-urlencode "refresh_token={{refresh_token}}" --data-urlencode "client_id={{client_id}}" --data-urlencode "client_secret={{client_secret}}"

item.description:
## Token Management

This folder handles OAuth 2.0 token lifecycle management for the Xero API. Use the requests here to maintain a valid access token during your session by exchanging credentials with Xero's identity server.

### Refresh Token

Exchanges an existing refresh token for a new access token by posting client credentials to the Xero identity endpoint. This is required when the current access token has expired.

**Endpoint:** `POST https://identity.xero.com/connect/token`

**Body Parameters (form-urlencoded):**

| Parameter | Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `grant_type` | `refresh_token` | Specifies the OAuth 2.0 grant type |
| `refresh_token` | `{{refresh_token}}` | The refresh token obtained during initial authorization |
| `client_id` | `{{client_id}}` | Your Xero application's client ID |
| `client_secret` | `{{client_secret}}` | Your Xero application's client secret |

On success, Xero returns a new `access_token` and `refresh_token`. Update your environment variables accordingly to continue making authenticated API requests.

oauth2.value: openid profile email offline_access accounting.transactions accounting.settings
